gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/14)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/14)
text: الْبَنُونَ نَعِيمٌ وَ الْبَنَاتُ حَسَنَاتٌ وَ اللَّهُ يَسْأَلُ عَنِ النَّعِيمِ وَ يُثِيبُ عَلَى الْحَسَنَاتِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Husayn Bin Musa, from Ahmad Bin Al Fazl,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The sons are Bounties, and the daughters are blessings, and Allah<sup>azwj</sup> would Question about the Bounties but He<sup>azwj</sup> would Rewards upon the ‘حَسَنَاتٌ’ (blessings).
en.sarwar: 12. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Husayn ibn Musa from Ahmad ibn al-Fadl who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Sons are bounties and daughters are good deeds, Allah questions one about the bounties but for the good deeds He gives good rewards.”’
